mapper.sql: userAddressId, userId, userName, phone, province, city, zone, addr, isDefault, status, createdDate
mapper.insert: insert into user_address (userAddressId, userId, userName, phone, province, city, zone, addr, isDefault, status, createdDate) values (#{userAddressId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isDefault,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into user_address
userAddressId,
userId,
userName,
phone,
province,
city,
zone,
addr,
isDefault,
status,
createdDate,
#{userAddressId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{zone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{addr,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{isDefault,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update user_address
userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
userName = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
province = #{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
city = #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
zone = #{zone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
addr = #{addr,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
isDefault = #{isDefault,jdbcType=TINYINT},
status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where userAddressId = #{userAddressId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update user_address set userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, userName = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, province = #{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, city = #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, zone = #{zone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, addr = #{addr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, isDefault = #{isDefault,jdbcType=TINYINT}, status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where userAddressId = #{userAddressId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_address WHERE userId =#{userId} AND isDefault=1
mapper.update: UPDATE user_address SET isDefault = CASE userAddressId WHEN #{userAddressId, jdbcType=BIGINT} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END WHERE userId = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
